name: Mushrooms a La Provencale
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, melt the butter.
2. Add garlic and onion; sauté 3 minutes or until tender.
3. Add mushrooms; sauté 1 minute or until just tender.
4. Stir in 1/4 teaspoon salt, 1/4 teaspoon pepper, bread crumbs, and parsley.
5. Toss to combine and serve. Makes 4-6 servings.
